textPlain: Yes, $5 USB HDMI capture cards exist?

I'm thinking a better solution for console would be an SSH to serial bridge using just a spare ESP32 and something like ESP32SerialSSHProxy[0]. Haven't tried myself yet, and there is suspiciously few stars on that repo, but that would be a nice lights out-ish management system for some hidden away home automation server.[0] https://github.com/programminghoch10/ESP32SerialSSHProxy
If you have an iPad with a USB-C port, you can use the free Orion app to do this toohttps://orion.tube/
Since there’s monitors that work over USB-C, could one replace the capture card and somehow get the laptop to pull video like a USB-C monitor?
That works sometimes. It can be flaky.
